title: Linking groups?
excerpt: Is it possible to link groups? What I have in mind is setting up boards for active jobs and close jobs. Each board contains three different office locations and their jobs. Once a job is marked as “Closed” I would like t…

posts.author: AmazingAssistant (Travis Gibbs)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to link groups? What I have in mind is setting up boards for active jobs and close jobs. Each board contains three different office locations and their jobs. Once a job is marked as “Closed” I would like to have that job moved to its proper group in the “Closed Jobs” board.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@AmazingAssistant,

There is not really any way in base monday to link groups.

The biggest problem with doing what you want is that group is not yet something that can be referenced within the trigger section of an automation. However, if you could add a status column to identify the office location, you could create a custom automation like the following to move the item when the status is changed:

image881×98 9.68 KB

Within the “item” section of the automation, you can specify which group you want the item to be moved to.

Then just setup a seperate automation for each office location.

posts.author: AmazingAssistant (Travis Gibbs)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a great second! Thanks so much!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
